title: Cámara de Comercio y Producción de La Vega Solicitud de Servicios del Registro Mercantil (S.R.L./S.A./S.E./S.A.S./S. EN N.C.)
description: The Cámara de Comercio y Producción de La Vega Real, Inc.'s 3-page 'Solicitud de Servicios del Registro Mercantil' (commercial-registry services request), the intake form used to request any of 29 distinct registro mercantil transactions — new registration, renewal, modification (capital change, domicile change, partner/shareholder change, dissolution, merger/spin-off, etc.), registry closure, or lost-certificate duplication — for a Sociedad Anónima (S.A.), Sociedad Anónima Simplificada (S.A.S.), Sociedad Responsabilidad Limitada (S.R.L.), Sociedad en Nombre Colectivo (S. EN N.C.), or Sociedad Extranjera (S.E.). This document opens the Dominican Republic's Business Formation vertical (4 of 6 verticals for the jurisdiction, following do/dgii/annual-corporate-income-tax-return-ir-2 (Taxes), do/mirex/passport-application (Passport), and do/dgii/vehicle-transfer-sworn-declaration-fi-vhm-308 (DMV)). The form is a genuine fillable AcroForm PDF (196 named fields; 195 modeled here, one wet-ink signature field excluded — see Scope decisions in VERIFICATION.md), freely downloadable from the chamber of commerce's own site with no login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate, and models: page 1's requester/gestor identification, the requested company type, the company's own identification data, and a 29-row checklist of which specific registro mercantil service(s) are being requested; page 2's current company status, business activity, and up to 8 shareholder/partner rows plus up to 4 governing-body (Consejo de Administración/Órgano de Gestión) member rows; and page 3's up to 2 administrator/authorized-signer rows, up to 2 optional comisario de cuentas (statutory auditor) rows, capital/assets figures, company duration, commercial/bank references, employee counts, branch/agency/affiliate addresses, regulated-entity data, and the closing sworn AUTORIZACIÓN DEL SOLICITANTE declaration. The source form's own printed note discloses that when the sole service requested is 'Duplicado por Pérdida' or 'Registro de Documentos', page 2's fields become optional and page 3 need only carry the AUTORIZACIÓN DEL SOLICITANTE — but the form does not print a complete field-applicability matrix for its other 27 service types, so (per Scope decisions below) only a minimal, structurally-necessary subset of fields is modeled required, with the remainder disclosed as optional rather than guessed. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Dominican Republic, the Cámara de Comercio y Producción de La Vega Real, Inc., or any Dominican chamber of commerce.

authority.name: Cámara de Comercio y Producción de La Vega Real, Inc.

source.documentRef: Solicitud de Servicios del Registro Mercantil — S.R.L./S.A./S.E./S.A.S./S. EN N.C. (Cámara de Comercio y Producción de La Vega Real, Inc.)

verification.notes: GOV-3167, picked up directly from the GOV-3152 cycle's pre-scouted, disclosed-backlog candidate, re-verified from scratch rather than trusted as-is: re-fetched fresh via a plain `curl` (no browser User-Agent or session needed), HTTP 200, `Content-Type: application/pdf`, 780,693 bytes, sha256 `0aa917a957691268ccc2b300c499ee9f0dce29c3b6c5c26140b1df4a2aa42889`, genuine `%PDF-1.5` header. No login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate encountered. pdfjs-dist 3.11.174 (installed standalone in a scratch directory for this task, not added as a repository dependency) confirmed 3 pages and, via `doc.getFieldObjects()`, exactly 196 named AcroForm fields — independently reconfirming the prior scouting note's count rather than trusting it as-is. `page.getAnnotations()` returned 210 Widget annotations across the 3 pages (196 unique field names plus 14 extra radio-button-group widgets: each of VIP, Cancillería, ComprobanteFiscal has 2 widgets sharing 1 field name; SolicitadoPor has 3; TipoSolicitud has 5; EstadoSociedad has 4; DuracionSociedad has 2; Gerente/Representante Autorizado has 2 — (2-1)+(2-1)+(2-1)+(3-1)+(5-1)+(4-1)+(2-1)+(2-1) = 14, reconciling 210 annotations to 196 distinct fields). Every field's label and section context was read from a node-canvas render of all 3 pages at 2.5x scale (the same technique used in this registry's do/mirex and il/mot cycles), cross-checked against each field's own annotation `rect` (x/y position) to resolve the many rows using generic pdfjs field names (`Text1`-`Text71`, `fill_2`/`fill_29`-`fill_50`) to their actual table row/column, by sorting annotations top-to-bottom then left-to-right per page and matching each generic-named field's position against the rendered grid lines. One field (`Firma`, page 3, the AUTORIZACIÓN DEL SOLICITANTE wet-ink signature line) is excluded — see Scope decisions — so 195 of the 196 source fields are modeled.

fields.name: declarantFullName
fields.label: Yo, ___
fields.description: The declarant's full legal name, filled into the blank of the sworn AUTORIZACIÓN DEL SOLICITANTE statement ('Yo, ___, en calidad de ___, por la presente afirmo bajo juramento que los datos son correctos y completos y que no he omitido ni falseado información alguna').
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, AUTORIZACIÓN DEL SOLICITANTE — Yo, ___

fields.name: declarantCapacity
fields.label: En calidad de
fields.description: The declarant's capacity: Gerente (manager) or Representante Autorizado (authorized representative). The source form's own note requires a power-of-attorney attachment when Representante Autorizado is selected ('*Nota: En caso de Representante Autorizado anexe poder de representación') — modeled here as a disclosed instruction, not as a fabricated documents[] requiredWhen gate, since no separate checkbox marks whether the attachment was actually included.
fields.sourceRef: Page 3, AUTORIZACIÓN DEL SOLICITANTE — Gerente / Representante Autorizado*
